name: spoiti-lists
description: Your Spotify playlists and liked songs inside SpotiFLAC. Uses Spotify’s official API; lists refresh when you open them (home feed may cache a few minutes).
author: AlexRabbit

settings.label: Spotify Client ID
settings.description: From Spotify Developer Dashboard (Desktop app). Never put your Client Secret here.

settings.label: Redirect URI
settings.description: Must match Spotify app settings exactly (default is usually fine).

settings.label: Connect to Spotify
settings.description: One tap: opens Spotify login in your browser and returns to SpotiFLAC.

settings.label: Authorization code (fallback)
settings.description: Usually not needed. Use only if callback is blocked; paste code= value (or full callback URL), save, then tap Finish login.

settings.label: Finish login (if needed)
settings.description: Fallback only. Usually not needed if callback opens SpotiFLAC.

settings.label: Disconnect
settings.description: Clear Spotify login for this extension.
